text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
In the evening, I spot<n>Matikanefukukitaru
standing in a<n>corner of the training track, acting<n>
somewhat oddly.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Nnnnn...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Nnn... Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Wha?! It was light out a second ago,<n>and now
it's dark?! When did that<n>happen?! Ack, my
knees hurt!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Sniffle! You're willing to hear meout?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Well, actually... I'm in a real big pickle<n>right now!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It all happened the other day—just as<n>my
friend-making lucky item turned<n>up...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Gosh, I can't thank you two enough!<n>With your
help, my precious<n>handkerchief is safe and
sound!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Now I can rest assured we'll stay the<n>best of
friends!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Stay the best of friends?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yup! Our friendship wouldn't exist<n>without my
lucky item!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hang on... So you're saying that<n>we're not
friends unless you have<n>that handkerchief?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Maybe you should try believing in us<n>more... And
yourself, too.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
They got so mad at me! And the more<n>I think
about it, the more confused I<n>get!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Our paths were intertwined by thegrace of divine guidance, so whywould that make them upset?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Her lack of confidence has led her to<n>believe that
she can't make friends<n>without her lucky charm.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps that's what brought about<n>the
misunderstanding.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh! What if the classroom was pent<n>up with
terrible energy? It must have<n>infected their
emotions... that explains<n>the negativity.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Unable to idly watch her imagination<n>run amok, I
give her my perspective.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: S-s-so my lucky charm is not thereason we're friends?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And saying that my friendships were<n>all created
through my lucky charm...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Is what made them mad at me? Oh...<n>now that
makes sense...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Not! That would be preposterous!Why would they be friends with methen?!
choice_data_list:
Your personality is yours alone, and that's why
they like you.

Your personality is yours alone, and that's why
they like you.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Say whaaat?! You've gotta be<n>kidding! The world
turning upside<n>down is more likely than that!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Th-th-that makes no sense! Like<n>that's just...
ridicu—

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: She freezes on the spot again.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Nnnnn...
choice_data_list:
Maybe you should go for a run to clear your
mind.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Do I... trust them?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Yeah, of course! I definitely trust<n>them!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I trust them, so... Ah! I HAVE SEEN<n>THE LIGHT!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Those two are extraordinary<n>Umamusume... so
by saying that, I<n>discounted the extraordinary
decision<n>they made!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That was totally rude of me! I have to<n>go and
apologize to them right away!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Well, not much else to say then. See<n>you later!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Lucky daaash!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: ...Go for a run?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, for a change of pace. You and<n>your good
ideas! I'll get to that right<n>away!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff... Phew!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Running at full speed sent all my<n>worldly
distractions packing! My body<n>and mind feel nice
and refreshed!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It got me thinking too—I'll talk it out<n>with them
properly tonight!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: ...Go for a run?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, for a change of pace. You and<n>your good
ideas! I'll get to that right<n>now!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff... Phew!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Golly gee, thinking too much filled my<n>head with
all sorts of thoughts—good<n>and bad!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Gee whiz, my mind is a mess!<n>Hmmm, I must
aim for greater heights!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
HUPPPPP! Eko, eko, azure seal! Eko,<n>eko, wall o'
rust!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As she recites her strange<n>incantation, she pulls
a pencil out of<n>nowhere and rolls it on the ground.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... "Showing sincerity leads to<n>good fortune."
I knew it! I must<n>apologize to them right away!
